content.en:
Then, Ye Tian said again: "Senior, if I go back and forth to the Purgatory Holy Sect again and again, I'm afraid I will be suspicious, after all, I am not a member of the Purgatory Holy Sect. "

The woman was silent for a moment, then reached out and grabbed it, and a piece of Spell Spirit Gold Ore appeared, and then she easily refined it into a token.

"With this token in hand, you can teleport directly into here, and it's easier to leave!" the woman said.

"Thank you, senior!"

Ye Tian was shocked, the eighth realm was really powerful, and he could refine such a treasure at his fingertips, he was far behind.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left.

After Ye Tian left, the woman's face became even paler, dense cracks appeared all over her body, and a large amount of black aura erupted from her body.

But soon, she suppressed the abnormality of her body again.

"Qian, if I can recover and step into the ninth realm one day, I will definitely kill you!"

The woman said coldly.

However, she didn't dare to go out now, her forces and everything were destroyed by the other party, and now she didn't dare to leave the Spell Spirit Gold Vein.

This place is very special, it has an impact on the eighth realm and even the ninth realm, but it can avoid the deduction of the ninth realm, she is hiding here, and with her own arrangement, the Qian of the ninth realm 477 will definitely not find her.

However, she had been hiding here for countless years, but her injuries were getting worse and worse, and coupled with the influence of the spell spirit gold, she was in good shape.

This time, she met Ye Tian and found that Ye Tian was very talented and had great potential, and he could definitely become an invincible existence in the sixth realm in the future, and it would not be a problem to break through the seventh realm, but he could be used as her spokesperson to collect resources for her.

As long as she gives enough benefits, it's not a big problem.

Of course, there were risks associated with this move, but she had to do it, otherwise it would get longer and longer, and her injuries would get worse and worse.

At that time, she dared to go out, once she dared to go out, she would definitely be perceived by Qian, and she would definitely die at that time.

Therefore, cooperating with Ye Tian is also a helpless thing.

......

After Ye Tian left the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, he thought about obtaining the Yuanxia Treasure Liquid.

The mysterious woman gave him three addresses, two of which were dangerous, but there were also many Yuanxia treasures there.

However, he will not go there for a while, he is going to go to the least dangerous place.

【Yuanmu River】(adfi)

The Yuanmu River is located in the territory of No. 3333, but its reputation is not obvious, after all, there are countless treasures in the upper domain, and the Yuanmu River is not a good place.

However, the Yuanmu River is pregnant with the resource of Yuanxia Mother Liquor.

Among the information given to him by the mysterious woman at the peak of the Eighth Realm, she introduced some information about the Yuanmu River.

Although the danger of the Yuanmu River is not high, it is only for those seventh realms, and for the sixth realm, the Yuanmu River is still extremely dangerous.

First of all, there are some extra-dimensional biological races in the Yuanmu River, and these extra-dimensional biological races are also a force, fortunately, there is no existence of the seventh realm, otherwise they can definitely rule the entire Yuanmu River.

Secondly, the Yuanxia Mother Liquor of the Yuanmu River will inevitably be occupied by a special super-dimensional creature, that super-dimensional creature is called the Yuanxia Mother Beast, which is very extremely powerful, and will be able to attack the Yuanxia Light, and the power is equivalent to one-third of the effect of the Supreme Peerless Sect of the Six Realms.

Because of this, those Sixth Realms didn't dare to go to the trouble of the Yuanxia Mother Beast at all.

Ye Tian didn't expect that he could seize Yuanxia's mother liquor this time, he just went over to take a look and understand the situation.

If he wants to obtain some Yuanxia Mother Liquor, he must at least create a Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sect by himself.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Yuanmu River.

Wow!

He went directly into the Yuanmu River to find the traces of Yuanxia's mother liquor.

According to the mysterious woman, Yuanxia Mother Liquid is extremely rare, it belongs to a niche type of resource, and there is no force to collect it, plus the Spell Spirit Gold Vein is also a niche type of ore vein, and the Purgatory Holy Sect does not know that Yuanxia Mother Liquid can resist the influence of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein.

Besides, even if they knew, they wouldn't use Yuanxia Mother Liquid to resist the influence of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, because it wasn't worth it.

It is too difficult for Yuanxia mother liquor to obtain, and the value is naturally extremely high, who can afford this price.

In the following days, Ye Tian was here looking for traces of Yuanxia's mother liquor.

After a long time.

Ye Tian finally found a trace of Yuanxia's mother liquor.

Somewhere deep in the Yuanmu River.

The six-headed Yuanxia mother beast lives here, and in this area where they live, there is a small well of Yuanxia mother liquor, in which there are a lot of Yuanxia mother liquor, and these six Yuanxia mother beasts are always guarding this Yuanxia mother liquor, absorbing wisps of Yuanxia mother liquor, but they dare not absorb too much.

Ye Tian immediately approached and was attacked by these six Yuanxia female beasts.

Rumble!!!

The light of the six Yuanxia was killed, Ye Tian didn't have time to dodge at all, and the tenfold dimensional rules plus a door defense method were used to defend it.

Outcome.

Burst!

The dimensional void that the rules of the ten-dimensional dimension turned into was pierced, and many means were also penetrated one by one, and his body was melted in an instant.

"What a terrifying Yuanxia light, instantly slashed my replica body!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

He knew that he had to create the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sect before he was qualified to fight them in order to obtain the Yuanxia Mother Liquor.

So, in the years that followed, he spent most of his time creating the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Learning.

Time flies.

The time of the three billion extradimensional epochs has passed, and if you convert it with the time on the upper domain, it is the thirty domain yuan years that have passed.

One domain element is equal to 100 million extradimensional epochs.

After thirty years of Domain Yuan, Ye Tian finally created his own Six Realms Supreme Peerless Learning.

【Ultimate Sword Light】

The power of this Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sect was terrifying, enough to increase his attack power by more than ten times, far surpassing the other Five Realms Supreme Peerless Sect and Six Realms Multidimensional Peerless Sect, which was a truly terrifying killing move.

After creating this Six Realms Supreme Peerless Ultimate Sword Light, his strength was also comparable to some Sixth Realms who were invincible in the Sixth Realm on the surface.

"You can go and take Yuanxia Mother Liquor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon.

He came to the place where Yuanxia Mother Liquid was held again, and mobilized the six replica bodies in one breath to deal with the six Yuanxia Mother Beasts.

"Kill!"

As soon as Ye Tian made a move, it was the ultimate sword light.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides were fighting, and the fluctuations of the battle shook a part of the Yuanmu River.
